suggested_actions: If recurring 5+ times, file Snowflake support ticket

decision_log.decision: Acknowledge as transient — no action needed
decision_log.rationale: The error is a known Snowflake transient internal error that self-resolved on the next run. Only 3 occurrences in 7 days, below the threshold for a support ticket.
alternatives_considered: escalate_to_de — but error self-resolved and is below ticket threshold
